programs.title: The Tracker's Diary: Bears of Katmai
programs.desc: After seeing a wolf in the distance and tracks on the shore, the crew head inland in search of more clues to the wolf's whereabouts.

programs.title: The Tracker's Diary: Bears of Katmai
programs.desc: Casey and the crew go out in search of the family of the lost cub from the previous night. They hope that if they find them, the cub will have found them as well.

programs.title: The Tracker's Diary: Bears of Katmai
programs.desc: As the end of their expedition draws near, salmon and bear activity begins to decline, but that doesn’t mean that there aren’t some bears still lingering around the area.

programs.title: The Secret Lives of Sharks
programs.desc: Travel to South Africa, one of the world's great shark hot spots, as Andy Casagrande observes the iconic great white shark and its behavior when hunting fur seals.

programs.title: The Secret Lives of Sharks
programs.desc: Travel to the Bahamas as Andy Casagrande attempts to place a fin camera on the elusive hammerhead shark… what could possibly go wrong.

programs.title: The Secret Lives of Sharks
programs.desc: Wildlife filmmaker Andy Casagrande travels off the coast of North Carolina to document never before seen behavior of one of the most misunderstood sharks in the world.
